attributePolicy: deferred until backend/CMS payload-backed domain metadata is available for topics and articles

surfaces.deferredReason: CmsTopicProfile.topicCode does not provide a stable mapping to scale code or decision domain. Hardcoding allowed topic slugs would create a fragile mapping that drifts with CMS changes.
surfaces.allowedWhen: backend/CMS payload field (e.g., decision_domain or scale_code) is added to topic model

surfaces.deferredReason: CmsArticle.relatedTestSlug can link to self_understanding test slugs, but mapping requires inverting SCALE_CANONICAL_SLUG_MAP and is not guaranteed stable. Articles without relatedTestSlug or with non-self-understanding test slugs must not receive attributes.
surfaces.allowedWhen: backend/CMS payload field (e.g., decision_domain or scale_code) is added to article model
